```
📡 INTERNET BENCHMARK DATA          💻 LOCAL EVALUATION DATA

                                         Tier: T1 - Excellent

🎯 RECOMMENDATION
  ✅ Using LOCAL data: qwen-coder-2.5
  🔄 Internet benchmark agrees: qwen-coder-2.5
```

### How It Works
